summary: A fun, enthusiastic 1976 East Coast performance captured on a good‑quality audience recording.
review: The show is described as lively and full of enthusiasm, typical of the Dead’s mid‑70s East Coast dates. The audience tape is noted to be pretty good, offering a nice instrumental range even though no soundboard source exists. Overall it’s considered worth listening to for fans who enjoy that era.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review highlights both an engaging performance and decent audience sound quality, leading to a solid rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience recording is described as pretty good with a nice range; no soundboard source available.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fun and enthusiastic performance typical of East Coast shows in ’76, maintaining high energy throughout.
